title: Popcorn Thursday
description: Enjoy free popcorn from Student Life!

title: Study With Cooking Club
description: Come join Cooking Club in studying for finals! There will be free snacks and drinks to fuel you!

title: FJJMA Study Week
host: Fred Jones Jr. Museum of Art
location: Fred Jones Jr. Museum of Art
description: Need a place to get ready for finals? Stop by the museum and enjoy a quiet, beautiful space to cram for exams. Or if you're looking to take a break from studying or grading, relax and refresh in the galleries surrounded by inspiring art. Free snacks and drinks will be provided. FJJMA Study Week is free for OU students, faculty, and staff.

title: ECCI End of Year Bash
description: OU Esports & Co-Curricular Innovation is hosting a free play day inside the OU Gaming Lounge of Cross B to support students in unwinding, destressing, and having some fun before finals. Alongside free play in the space (PCs, Consoles, Racing Rigs, etc), we'll also have free refreshments, music, tabletop, board games, and giveaways!
